{{Quote|It's too late for us, but perhaps we can spare some other vessel a similar fate.|The ship's captain|<ref name="Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings">{{Tales|5|Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings}}</ref>}}
'''''Dewback's Burden''''' was a [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] that served with the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. It was named after the [[Dewback/Legends|dewback]], a common beast of burden. The ship was captained by a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] officer and was crewed by a mix of different [[Species/Legends|species]], including [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]], [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], and [[Human/Legends|Humans]].

While leading a convoy carrying supplies to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Bhuna Sound/Legends|Bhuna Sound]], ''Dewback's Burden'' was ambushed by the [[Eiattu pirates|TIE Pirates]], having been caught coming out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] with its [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] down. The pirates systematically destroyed its [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] support, [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadron]]—composed of [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]—and then surgically disabled its [[Life support/Legends|life support]] and [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drive]] systems.

With the ship lying dead in space, the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] officer [[Saluc]] suggested that they prepare for boarding; however, the ship's [[Captain/Legends|captain]] recognized their approach. They were using an old [[Iska pirates/Legends|Iska pirate]] ploy, towing the ship away while waiting for the lack of life support to kill off the entire crew without any losses to their own forces. The vessel's captain then ordered the ship's data to be downloaded into [[DRK-1 Dark Eye probe droid/Legends|distress buoys]] which were then launched ''en masse''. These eventually reached the [[New Republic High Command/Legends|New Republic High Command]].

This valuable information was used by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] to track down the pirates, utilizing specially-requested equipment, which included a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaked]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] and the aid of the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]], [[Air Marshal]] [[Von Asch]].
